rcu.c(3) Library Functions Manual rcu.c(3)

NAME

rcu.c

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct field_option_map_t
Field name to registry option name mapping. struct int_field_ctx_t
Context for integer field updates in RCU updater callback. struct bool_field_ctx_t
Context for boolean field updates in RCU updater callback. struct string_field_ctx_t
Context for string field updates in RCU updater callback. struct double_field_ctx_t
Context for double field updates in RCU updater callback.

Macros


#define MAX_DEFERRED_FREES 64
Deferred free list for old options structs.

Functions


__attribute__ ((constructor))
Constructor to initialize fork handlers at startup. asciichat_error_t options_state_init (void)
Initialize RCU options system. asciichat_error_t options_state_set (const options_t *opts)
Set options from a parsed options struct. void options_state_destroy (void)
Shutdown RCU options system. void options_cleanup_schema (void)
Clean up schema resources. const options_t * options_get (void)
Get pointer to current options struct (lock-free, thread-safe). asciichat_error_t options_set_int (const char *field_name, int value)
Check if an option was explicitly set via command-line. asciichat_error_t options_set_bool (const char *field_name, bool value)
asciichat_error_t options_set_string (const char *field_name, const char *value)
asciichat_error_t options_set_double (const char *field_name, double value)

Macro Definition Documentation

#define MAX_DEFERRED_FREES 64

Deferred free list for old options structs. We can't immediately free old structs because readers might still be using them. Simple strategy: Keep old pointers in a list, free them at shutdown.

Future improvements:

  • Hazard pointers: Track which structs readers are using
  • Epoch-based reclamation: Free after grace period
  • Reference counting: Free when no readers

Current approach: Never free until shutdown (acceptable for rare updates)

Definition at line 278 of file rcu.c.

Function Documentation

__attribute__ ((constructor) )

Constructor to initialize fork handlers at startup. This is called before main() by the linker, ensuring fork handlers are registered early.

Definition at line 355 of file rcu.c.

355                                                                                   {
356   // Register the child handler that will be called after fork() in the child process
357   pthread_atfork(NULL, NULL, options_rcu_atfork_child);
358 }








void
  options_cleanup_schema (void )


Clean up schema resources. Frees the dynamically allocated options
    schema array and all associated strings. Should be called at program
    shutdown after options_state_destroy(). Safe to call multiple times
    or if schema was never built.


Definition at line 478 of file rcu.c.


478                                   {
479   config_schema_destroy();
480 }






References config_schema_destroy().


Referenced by main().






void
  options_state_destroy (void )


Shutdown RCU options system. Frees the current options struct and
    cleans up resources. Should be called at program shutdown after all threads
    have exited.


Definition at line 447 of file rcu.c.


447                                  {
448   // Check if initialized using lifecycle
449   if (!lifecycle_is_initialized(&g_options_lifecycle)) {
450     return;
451   }
452 
453   /* Shutdown lifecycle to mark as no longer initialized */
454   lifecycle_shutdown(&g_options_lifecycle);
455 
456   // Get current options pointer
457   options_t *current = atomic_ptr_load(&g_options);
458 
459   // Clear the atomic pointer (prevent further reads)
460   atomic_ptr_store(&g_options, NULL);
461 
462   // Free current struct
463   SAFE_FREE(current);
464 
465   // Free all deferred structs
466   deferred_free_all();
467 
468   // Cleanup schema (frees all dynamically allocated config strings)
469   config_schema_destroy();
470 
471   // Destroy dynamically created mutexes
472   mutex_destroy(&g_options_write_mutex);
473   mutex_destroy(&g_deferred_free_mutex);
474 
475   log_debug("Options state shutdown complete");
476 }






References atomic_ptr_load(), atomic_ptr_store(),
    config_schema_destroy(), lifecycle_is_initialized(),
    lifecycle_shutdown(), log_debug, mutex_destroy(), and
    SAFE_FREE.


Referenced by asciichat_shared_destroy(),
    client_cleanup(), main(), and mirror_cleanup().






asciichat_error_t options_state_init (void )


Initialize RCU options system. Must be called once at program
    startup before any threads access options. Allocates initial options struct
    and sets up atomic pointer.




Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 365 of file rcu.c.


365                                            {
366   // Detect fork: after fork(), child process must reinitialize
367   pid_t current_pid = platform_get_pid();
368   if ((lifecycle_is_initialized(&g_options_lifecycle) || g_init_pid != -1) && g_init_pid != current_pid) {
369     log_debug("Detected fork in options_state_init (parent PID %d, child PID %d) - resetting lifecycle", g_init_pid,
370               current_pid);
371     /* Reset lifecycle to allow reinitialization after fork */
372     lifecycle_shutdown(&g_options_lifecycle);
373     g_init_pid = current_pid;
374   }
375 
376   // Check if already initialized in this process using lifecycle
377   if (lifecycle_is_initialized(&g_options_lifecycle) && g_init_pid == current_pid) {
378     log_warn("Options state already initialized");
379     return ASCIICHAT_OK;
380   }
381 
382   /* Use lifecycle to serialize initialization */
383   if (!lifecycle_init(&g_options_lifecycle, "options")) {
384     /* Another thread is initializing or already initialized */
385     if (lifecycle_is_initialized(&g_options_lifecycle)) {
386       return ASCIICHAT_OK;
387     }
388     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Failed to acquire options initialization lock");
389   }
390 
391   // Initialize write mutex
392   if (mutex_init(&g_options_write_mutex, "options_write") != 0) {
393     lifecycle_shutdown(&g_options_lifecycle);
394     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_THREAD, "Failed to initialize options write mutex");
395   }
396 
397   // Initialize deferred free mutex
398   if (mutex_init(&g_deferred_free_mutex, "deferred_free") != 0) {
399     mutex_destroy(&g_options_write_mutex);
400     lifecycle_shutdown(&g_options_lifecycle);
401     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_THREAD, "Failed to initialize deferred free mutex");
402   }
403 
404   // Allocate initial options struct (will be populated later by options_state_populate_from_globals)
405   options_t *initial_opts = SAFE_MALLOC(sizeof(options_t), options_t *);
406   if (!initial_opts) {
407     mutex_destroy(&g_options_write_mutex);
408     mutex_destroy(&g_deferred_free_mutex);
409     lifecycle_shutdown(&g_options_lifecycle);
410     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate initial options struct");
411   }
412 
413   // Initialize all defaults using options_t_new()
414   *initial_opts = options_t_new();
415 
416   // Publish initial struct (release semantics - make all fields visible to readers)
417   atomic_ptr_store(&g_options, initial_opts);
418 
419   g_init_pid = current_pid; // Record PID to detect fork later
420   log_dev("Options state initialized with RCU pattern (PID %d)", current_pid);
421 
422   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
423 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, atomic_ptr_store(),
    ERROR_INVALID_STATE, ERROR_MEMORY, ERROR_THREAD,
    lifecycle_init(), lifecycle_is_initialized(),
    lifecycle_shutdown(), log_debug, log_dev,
    log_warn, mutex_destroy(), mutex_init(),
    options_t_new(), platform_get_pid(), SAFE_MALLOC, and
    SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by __attribute__(), and
  options_init().






asciichat_error_t options_state_set (const
  options_t * opts)


Set options from a parsed options struct. Called by
    options_init() after parsing to publish the options struct to RCU.
    This atomically replaces the current options with the provided struct.




Parameters


opts Pointer to options struct to publish (will be
  copied)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 425 of file rcu.c.


425                                                            {
426   if (!opts) {
427     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "opts is NULL");
428   }
429 
430   // Check initialization state using lifecycle
431   if (!lifecycle_is_initialized(&g_options_lifecycle)) {
432     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Options state not initialized (call options_state_init first)");
433   }
434 
435   // Get current struct (should be the initial zero-initialized one during startup)
436   options_t *current = atomic_ptr_load(&g_options);
437 
438   // Copy provided options into current struct
439   // Note: No need for RCU update here since this is called during initialization
440   // before any reader threads exist
441   memcpy(current, opts, sizeof(options_t));
442 
443   log_debug("Options state set from parsed struct");
444   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
445 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, atomic_ptr_load(),
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_INVALID_STATE,
    lifecycle_is_initialized(), log_debug, and
  SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by config_load_and_apply(), and
    options_init().
